title: qPCR data of the article "Comparative Analysis of Telomere Length in Peripheral Blood of Breast Cancer BRCA1 Mutation Carriers and Non-Carriers"
author: Kroupa, Michal
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
EDS files contain data generated by the ViiA™ 7 qPCR machine (Applied Biosystems ViiA™ 7 Real-Time PCR System).   
 Data have been processed using QuantStudio software.
steps_raw:
